afterSnapshot.name: getWindAlert

threshold.description: Optional gust alert threshold in knots; overrides the WIND_GUST_ALERT_THRESHOLD_KNOTS config default (25)

200.description: Wind gust alert for the position

schema.summary: Flag whether current wind gusts exceed a threshold

afterSnapshot.purpose: Flag whether current wind gusts at a position exceed a configurable threshold, with a human-readable message.

context.userMessage: Approved — build it, then run the tests and checks to verify.

rationale: New endpoint required to surface a simple gust-vs-threshold alert for a position.
implementation: Mirrors getWeather/getBestWindow: delegates coordinate validation to withValidatedCoords, reuses the shared fetchWeather Result, resolves the effective threshold (query override → config → 25), then runs the pure computeWindAlert and maps it to JSON.
